title: AASTMT Vice President Working Visit To NIMASA
description: Vice President, African and Asian Affairs of Arab Academy for Science, Technology & Maritime Transport (AASTMT), Egypt, Professor Alsnosy Mohamed Balbaa pays a working visit to NIMASA.
html: Vice President, African and Asian Affairs of Arab Academy for Science, Technology & Maritime Transport (AASTMT), Egypt, Professor Alsnosy Mohamed Balbaa pays a working visit to NIMASA.
